projects: ​projects​
​smartbiobin – automated waste classification & methane monitoring system​​2024 – 2025​
​first author, ieee csitss 2025 | ieee xplore:​​https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/1129559​
​•​ ​developed an arduino uno–based waste classification system using ir, moisture, inductive, and mq-4​
​sensors.​
​•​ ​implemented sensor fusion logic for automated biodegradable/non- biodegradable segregation with servo​
​actuation.​ ​monitored methane levels (4–18 ppm rise) during controlled decomposition experiments.​
​•​ ​designed 3d structure with optimized sensor placement and enabled real-time feedback via lcd and leds.​
​•​ ​built a real-time embedded system integrating multiple sensors and actuators for automated​
​decision-making​
​potato plant disease classification – full-stack web application​​2026​
​•​ ​designed and trained a​​convolutional neural network (cnn)​​for multi-class plant disease classification​
​(99.21% accuracy)​
​•​ ​performed dataset preprocessing, augmentation, and model evaluation to improve generalization​
​•​ ​developed a​​fastapi-based inference service​​and integrated with a​​react ui​​for image upload and​
​prediction​
​achievements & activities​
​•​ ​first author​​of a research paper presented at the 9th ieee international conference on computational​
​systems & information technology for sustainable solutions (csitss-2025), rv college of engineering,​
​bengaluru.​
​•​ ​solved 60+ problems on leetcode, focusing on arrays, strings, recursion, and greedy algorithms.​
​certifications​
​•​ ​intro to machine learning, kaggle​
​•​ ​python, hackerrank​
​•​ ​problem solving, hackerrank​
